workflows.title: Appointment booking
workflows.purpose: Manage the full appointment lifecycle from creation through rescheduling and cancellation while enforcing staff availability and preventing overlapping bookings.

implementationSuggestions.title: Validate availability before booking
implementationSuggestions.reason: Prevent double-booking by checking availability_slot status and enforcing appointmentNoOverlapPerStaff in the usecase layer.

implementationSuggestions.title: Atomically update availability slot on book/reschedule
implementationSuggestions.reason: Ensure availability_slot and appointment states remain consistent during concurrent bookings.

workflows.title: Check-in and checkout
workflows.purpose: Coordinate appointment check-in, service completion, and sale recording with inventory consumption and commission calculation.

implementationSuggestions.title: Atomic sale and inventory update
implementationSuggestions.reason: Record sale and create inventory_ledger_entry in a single transaction to enforce inventoryCannotGoNegative and keep metrics consistent.

implementationSuggestions.title: Auto-calculate commissions on checkout
implementationSuggestions.reason: Trigger commission calculation immediately after sale recording to keep performance_metrics current.

workflows.title: Inventory adjustment
workflows.purpose: Track manual stock adjustments and corrections through the inventory ledger while maintaining non-negative stock levels.

implementationSuggestions.title: Require adjustment reason
implementationSuggestions.reason: Ensure every inventory_ledger_entry includes a change_type and notes for audit purposes.

workflows.title: Commission calculation
workflows.purpose: Compute and update staff commissions for a period based on sales and configured commission rules.

implementationSuggestions.title: Schedule periodic commission recalculation
implementationSuggestions.reason: Automate nightly or weekly commission runs to ensure performance_metrics remain accurate without manual owner intervention.

implementationSuggestions.title: Create review task for commission exceptions
implementationSuggestions.reason: If commission calculation detects anomalies, create a task for the owner to review before finalizing payouts.

workflows.title: Walk-in time slot suggestion
workflows.purpose: Generate optimal walk-in time slots for today by analyzing staff availability and current appointment load.

implementationSuggestions.title: Cache walk-in suggestions briefly
implementationSuggestions.reason: Reduce LLM/agent load by caching suggestions for a few minutes since availability changes slowly within the current day.

workflows.title: Upsell suggestion
workflows.purpose: Suggest relevant add-on services to a customer based on their visit history and the current service catalog.

implementationSuggestions.title: Integrate with recommendation agent
implementationSuggestions.reason: Leverage the recommendationAgent to generate contextual upsell suggestions using customer and service data.

questions: Should the appointment booking workflow include a draft/hold state for temporary slot reservations while the receptionist confirms with the customer?
Should the check-in and checkout workflow enforce a maximum time window between check-in and completion to auto-cancel stale appointments?
Should commission calculation run automatically after each sale, or remain an on-demand/scheduled automation triggered by the owner?
trace: Mapped approved workflow artifacts to workflow definitions with execution modes.
Linked module-owned persistence tables (availabilitySlot, inventoryLedgerEntry) to workflows that depend on local state.
Referenced layer_3_usecases for transitions and metric tables for operational feeds.
Prioritized now for core operational workflows and soon for LLM-assisted suggestions.
